featureName: BUG-024-006: docs/smackerel.md §24-A architecture-tree connector count stale at 16 (missing Card Rewards) while §22.7 + docs/Development.md + runtime slice agree on 17, plus TestConnectorCountContract 4th-surface blind spot that pins only 3 of the 4 connector-count surfaces

fixSequence.task: Extend internal/deploy/docs_connector_count_contract_test.go: add smackerelMdTreeRe (`Connector plugins \((\d+) committed\)`) + parseSmackerelMdTreeCount + fold §24-A into assertConnectorCountContract as a 4th surface + add TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialSmackerelMdTreeLow. RED-prove: with §24-A still at 16, TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile MUST fail (§24-A=16 vs runtime=17).

Reconcile docs/smackerel.md §24-A: line 2892 header (16 committed)→(17 committed); line 2908 glyph └──→├── for QF Decisions; insert `└── Card Rewards (cardrewards/ — spec 083 read-only rotating-category fetch)` leaf. GREEN: re-run the contract test (exit 0, four surfaces agree on 17). Backfill parent governance; land single atomic bubbles(024/bug-024-006) commit; push.

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created BUG-024-006 8-artifact packet for a verified committed-tree defect discovered in stochastic-quality-sweep round R29 (mode: stochastic-quality-sweep, parent-expanded child mode: gaps-to-doc) on specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation, the spec that owns the R-006 connector-inventory accuracy contract for docs/smackerel.md. F2 (MEDIUM, primary): docs/smackerel.md §24-A architecture-tree header (line 2892) reads 'Connector plugins (16 committed)' with a 16-leaf list (lines 2893-2908) ending at QF Decisions and omitting Card Rewards (cardrewards/, spec 083), while §22.7 header (line 2783)='(17 connectors)', docs/Development.md line 31='17 passive connectors', and cmd/core/connectors.go lines 68-72 register 17 — §24-A is the single stale surface. F3 (MEDIUM, root cause): internal/deploy/docs_connector_count_contract_test.go pins only 3 surfaces (connectorsGoSliceRe L81, smackerelMdHeaderRe L89 §22.7, developmentMdBulletRe L95) and has no regex for the §24-A 'Connector plugins (N committed)' line, so §24-A silently drifted to 16 while the 3 pinned surfaces moved to 17 and TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile still passes GREEN logging 'all agree on 17' (test line 236). Verified with real commands at HEAD 7844283b: grep of both headers, awk dump of the §24-A leaf block showing Card Rewards absent, grep confirming Card Rewards present in the other 3 surfaces, grep of connectors.go slice (L68-72), grep of the test's 3 regexes, and ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestConnectorCountContract --verbose (EXIT_CODE=0, internal/deploy ok 0.029s). No fix performed; no commit. Parent spec 024 stays status: done. Routed test→docs.

Extended internal/deploy/docs_connector_count_contract_test.go to pin docs/smackerel.md §24-A 'Connector plugins (N committed)' as a 4th connector-count surface (F3): added smackerelMdTreeRe + parseSmackerelMdTreeCount + folded §24-A into assertConnectorCountContract's four-surface equality + added TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialSmackerelMdTreeLow. RED-proved with §24-A still stale at 16: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestConnectorCountContract --verbose → --- FAIL: TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile (cmd/core/connectors.go=17, docs/smackerel.md §22.7=17, docs/smackerel.md §24-A=16, docs/Development.md=17), EXIT_CODE=1; the new adversarial sub-test + the 3 pre-existing adversarial sub-tests all PASS (non-tautological pin, no regression). Evidence: report.md → 'bubbles.test — F3 Test-Extension RED Proof'. No doc edit, no commit; nextRequiredOwner: bubbles.docs.

Reconciled docs/smackerel.md §24-A architecture tree 16→17 (F2): header line 2892 'Connector plugins (16 committed)' → '(17 committed)'; QF Decisions leaf glyph └── → ├──; inserted '└── Card Rewards (cardrewards/ — spec 083 read-only rotating-category fetch)' as the new terminal leaf (17 leaves Gov Alerts → Card Rewards), matching §22.7 row-17 read-only framing (Principle 10 QF Companion boundary). GREEN-proved: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestConnectorCountContract --verbose → --- PASS: TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile (four surfaces agree on 17) + all 4 adversarial sub-tests PASS + ok internal/deploy 0.079s + EXIT_CODE=0; ./smackerel.sh check → EXIT_CODE=0 (config/SST/scenario-lint clean). Only docs/smackerel.md §24-A touched (git diff: 3 insertions, 2 deletions). Evidence: report.md → 'bubbles.docs — F2 §24-A Reconciliation GREEN Proof'. No commit; parent spec 024 governance recert + consolidated commit deferred to bubbles.devops; spec 024 stays status: done. nextRequiredOwner: bubbles.devops.

executionHistory.summary: Discovered + documented + root-caused a genuine committed-tree defect on spec 024's owned R-006 dimension: F2 (MEDIUM) docs/smackerel.md §24-A architecture tree stale at 16 (missing Card Rewards) vs §22.7/Development.md/runtime at 17; F3 (MEDIUM) TestConnectorCountContract pins only 3 of the 4 connector-count surfaces (§24-A 'Connector plugins (N committed)' uncovered), so the drift passes GREEN. Single Scope 1 (both findings share one root cause — §24-A is an unpinned surface that lagged the 16→17 transition). Routed test→docs: bubbles.test pins §24-A as a 4th surface and RED-proves; bubbles.docs reconciles §24-A 16→17 + Card Rewards leaf and turns it GREEN. No fix/commit by bubbles.bug. Packet artifacts: bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json, state.json.

F3 (RED, bubbles.test) + F2 (GREEN, bubbles.docs) both closed one-to-one. bubbles.test extended internal/deploy/docs_connector_count_contract_test.go to pin §24-A as a 4th connector-count surface and RED-proved the gap (TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile FAIL at docs/smackerel.md §24-A=16 vs runtime 17, EXIT_CODE=1; new + 3 pre-existing adversarial sub-tests PASS). bubbles.docs reconciled docs/smackerel.md §24-A header 16→17 and inserted the Card Rewards (cardrewards/, spec 083) leaf after QF Decisions, turning the contract test GREEN (TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile PASS — four surfaces agree on 17 — all 4 adversarial sub-tests PASS, ok internal/deploy, EXIT_CODE=0); ./smackerel.sh check EXIT_CODE=0. scopes.md DoD: SCN-001 fidelity + post-fix GREEN proof + no-regression items ticked; Scope 1 → In Progress; bug.md → In Progress + Fixed.
